choices.text: ComputeBudgetProgram.setComputeUnitLimit({ units: 600000 }) + setComputeUnitPrice({ microLamports: 5000 }). Sets CU budget + per-CU priority fee. During congestion 1k-100k+; fetch via getRecentPrioritizationFees for dynamic pricing.

questions.explanation: ComputeBudgetProgram for CU limit + priority fee.

choices.text: Simulate before submit (catches errors); retry with fresh blockhash on failure; priority fee from getRecentPrioritizationFees; confirmation at "confirmed" commitment (balance latency vs. safety). Production-grade pattern.

questions.explanation: Simulate + retry + priority fees + commitment = reliability.
